positive: A stylized, central illustration of a whimsical forest creature composed of glowing celestial elements and flora. The creature has large, expressive eyes and delicate, translucent wings resembling stained glass. It is surrounded by glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and twisted, ornate jungle vines. Use a neo-Victorian etching style mixed with bright, ethereal watercolor washes. The composition should be symmetrical and isolated on a clean, pale cream background, emphasizing the strong black outlines and vibrant, saturated glow of the subject. Dynamic yet calm mood. Studio lighting, perfect symmetry, highly detailed, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grayscale, photorealistic, grainy
